name: Speedy Salmon Pizza
recipeIngredient: 396 g Chopped tomatoes with herbs (canned), drained
100 g Button mushrooms, trimmed and sliced
100 g Olives stuffed with pimento (green olives)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 200°C, 400°F, or Gas mark 6.
2. Drain the salmon and break it into large pieces. Set aside.
3. Place the pizza bases on two silicone baking trays lined with parchment paper.
4. Spread equal amounts of drained tomatoes over each pizza base.
5. Arrange the salmon pieces on top of the tomatoes.
6. Decorate with mushrooms and olives, then cover with cheese.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.
8. Serve with salad. Serves 4-6. Approx. 430 kcals per serving.
